message:
🎨 acmm: breathing room on Current Level + sort inventory by level (#8442)

Two layout improvements:

1. Current Level card: bumped padding (p-2 → p-4), gap (gap-2 → gap-4),
   line-height (leading-snug → leading-relaxed), and level-list row
   padding (py-0.5 → py-1). Card now breathes instead of feeling
   cramped.

2. Feedback Loop Inventory: criteria are now sorted by level (ascending)
   so all sources (ACMM, Fullsend, AEF, Reflect) mix together by
   maturity tier. Level is a fixed-width column (w-6) between the
   status icon and the name for clean vertical alignment. Previously
   level was inline at the right edge, hard to scan.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
